stemHtml:
What is the most probable reason for a controller to issue the following message?

'G-ABCD disregard CPDLC route clearance direct DASNI message, break, cleared direct ALKIS, rest of route unchanged.'

options.a: To correct the direct-to clearance and re-issue a clearance direct to ALKIS.
options.b: To inform of a complete CPDLC system failure and revert to voice communication.
options.c: To inform of a single-message failure and pass the new clearance direct to ALKIS.
options.d: To correct the direct-to clearance and re-issue a clearance direct to DASNI.
